title: oncidium tetrapetalum
intro: Oncidium tetrapetalum, also known as the Four-Petaled Orchid or Golden Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oncidium tetrapetalum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating fever, coughs, and sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infusion, and it is also dried and used in capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
